title: Vendor Risk Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger vendor risk foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Vendor Risk Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Vendor Risk Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good vendor risk foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Vendor Risk Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
